# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  name: <storage_account_name>
  apiVersion: 2023-01-01
  location: <location>
  properties:
    accountKind: StorageV2
    accountTier: Standard_LRS
    enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true
    minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/<storage_account_name>/blobServices/default
  name: default
  apiVersion: 2023-01-01
  properties:
    containerAcl: Blob

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/<storage_account_name>/blobContainers
  name: <container_name>
  apiVersion: 2023-01-01
  properties:
    publicAccess: Blob
    metadata:
      webSiteName: <website_name>
